name: markdown-toc-generator
goal: Read the Markdown document at document.md. Generate a table of contents at toc.md containing one bullet line per H2 (## ...) header found, in document order, formatted as: '- [Header Text](#header-anchor)' where header-anchor is the GitHub-style anchor (lowercase, spaces replaced with hyphens, punctuation stripped). Do not include H1 or H3+ headers.

notes.purpose: Tier 1 Markdown parsing. Stresses the model's understanding of the GitHub anchor convention. The two anchored content checks pin specific H2 headers from the fixture so the model can't skip rows.
